description:
Native REST API client for Windows, macOS and Linux


- Added the ability to open a folder after saving a response and exporting requests on macOS and Linux
- Added export/import of request description and tests fields
- Added animation for waiting for a response in the list of requests
- Added a color indicator for test results on the Tests tab
- Added XML syntax highlighting
- Added installer signature/certificate verification before auto-update [issues-76]
- Added request size check to avoid data loss [issues-79]
- Improved function random.string to 65535 characters. [issues-82]
- Improved performance of searching in the response body
- Fixed a freeze – improved rendering of XML response [issues-75]
- Fixed a freeze when expanding and collapsing JSON elements [issues-80]
- Fixed the download file name when updating the portable version [issues-78]
- Fixed other bugs and other improvements
